Pollux WoD is a solid DPS wheel providing straight up stats. CR/CD/Base Dmg. 

Clem WoD is a amazing Ultra WoD in any Ultra team, allowing insane Aliemus fueling, and Keyflare Gen from stats and passive. Very good WoD.

Tawil WoD is amazing in general since it’s a handsize WoD. Furthermore, it’s a Keyflare WoD that helps gain more Keyflare by a percentage based on your Keyflare Stat. The Passive itself is only usuable on a handful on Awakeners thou, such as Tawil/Kath. The WoD is great on Tawil.
Not enough details. Solid amount of text thou.

just put castor and pollux in a team then flex units and call it a day Kat..

I agree with the sentiment. It sucks that Standards can’t clear endgame, without any Limited Awakeners. However, the game is generous enough with pulls to the point you can build a solid Limited Awakener Team to clear Endgame. Furthermore, Standard Pulls can be used to focus on exceptionally WoDs, while Limited Pulls on Awakeners. Having a monthly free one dupe system isn’t insane, but it fairly nice. As long as you talk with others, and gather a good opinion on how you want to pull and move forward with team building and WoDs, you won’t be “unable” to clear the game. 

The point that Standards can’t clear endgame by themselves does suck, but if they could, then what’s the point of Limited Awakeners. Furthermore, how could the game’s difficulty be ramped higher? 

Just some thoughts to consider~

There is a +12 Castor for one team. A OE Kath for another twam. A OE Pollux for another team. 

+8 Daff and +8 Sorel can carry albeit with some support. Doreslain falls in the category if either he is built to the point he overkills or doesn’t kill at all.

Since Lotan is +12, there is a possibility of OE Spam Lotan. Liz +12 means it’s possible to clear with her with heavy support or WoDs.

OE Clem is a god tier support, and +5 Lily is a insane tank(W/her Sig). 24 is weird, and I am unsure about her. Sometime she seems useful, and other times she needs max invest. I know she can be played in Poison Comp, or Daf 24 Comp. Ogier is a amazing STR stacker, and Shielder. Jenkin offers CR/CD and works as Sub-Dps. OE Winkle is a amazing support with her Aliemus Gen Exalt and some Skey. Salva can be DPS/Survival at E3. Corpo is weaker without E3 for Burst Turn. OE Tinct is really nice for Daffodil and Kath. Gramona would be nice for Kath. OE Inferno has general flex usuages or W3 D-Tide(Perhaps somrthing with Liz, I have seen that helps get Liz Dmg Amping). Erica is generally good with Ultra teams, but Castor probably likes her best. Nautila is general Survival Awakener. Pickman can generate alot of Embryos and setup incredible Burst Turns, furthering that with Multi Hits cause of “Filigree Agate”(Sorel or Doreslain). Horla slots into virtually anything, especially at E1.

Nice...

1. what do Daff’s Mirages scale off? Exalt?
2. is Aliemus Regen a good stat to invest into or does it have diminishing returns?

1. Either strength or damage amplification or the counter/poison bonus.

This is why gDoll oe is strong with Daffodil. The oe increases damage amplification + counter and poison damage.

2. Its the stats that after an exalt how much aliemus you get right away. You only really want this built up on units you exalt again and again like gdoll or 24.
